name: Jasmine

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Created by Paul Harrington at Townhouse Bar in Emeryville, CA in the 1990s. Published in his cocktail column. It's a Prohibition-esque cocktail that bridges gin sours and Negroni territory — bitter (Campari), orange (Cointreau), citrus, and gin in perfect proportion.
